title: Custom Wicked (Broadway)  Music
description: Changes the default disk music to music from Wicked (Broadway)
body:
5- No One Mourns the Wicked

11- Dear Old Shiz

13- Dancing Through Life

blocks- What Is This Feeling?

cat- Something Bad

chirp- The Wizard And I

far- Popular

mall- Defying Gravity

mellohi- Wonderful

otherside- I'm Not That Girl

pigstep- A Sentimental Man

relic- March Of The Witch Hunters

stal- Thank Goodness

strad- For Good

wait- Finale

ward- No Good Deed

Please donate to The Broadway League Foundation.

About Charity: The Broadway League Foundation Inc. acts as The Broadway League's charitable arm. Its mission is to support the arts education, community engagement, and audience access programs of the Broadway League.

https://www.broadwayleague.com/about/foundation/

All songs are property of their respective artists
